title: ds-workspace coverage map
description: First-class artifact tracking which pattern areas have been explored, what approaches were tried inside each, and which ceilings were hit. Queried by the exploration-loop 'pick' step. Updated at every VALIDATE exit.

schema_version.description: Schema version. v2 introduced direction_fatigue_counter per pattern_area (ds-patterns/curiosity-discipline.md).

direction_fatigue_threshold.description: Workspace-level default for the per-area fatigue counter. When any pattern_area's direction_fatigue_counter reaches this value, the orchestrator MUST dispatch the Research Lead before opening the next version.

direction_fatigue_lift_threshold.description: Absolute lift below which an attempt is counted toward direction_fatigue_counter. Unit is the primary metric.

name.description: Pattern area identifier. Canonical values match ds-patterns/*.md filenames plus any project-specific areas.

outcome.description: Outcome vs. the run's reference baseline.

lift.description: cv_mean delta vs. reference; null if blocked/invalidated.

brainstorm_ref.description: Path to brainstorm file where this approach was documented.

ceiling_reason.description: Set only when exhausted=true. 'approach-exhausted' = this technique is tapped. 'feature-limited' = signal may not exist in current features. 'intrinsic' = DGP may not support better. 'budget-capped' = we stopped on budget, not on ceiling (re-evaluable).

remaining_leverage_estimate.description: Orchestrator's subjective estimate of remaining upside. Used by the 'pick' step to rank unexplored areas. Must be justified in notes_ref when >0.5 for an exhausted area.

priority.description: Set by FRAME from the data-contract / DGP. 'top' areas trigger warnings in consistency_lint if left unexplored at SHIP.

direction_fatigue_counter.description: Schema v2. Number of consecutive attempts in this area with |lift| < direction_fatigue_lift_threshold. Reset on material lift, on a confirmed disproven-card for the area family, or when the orchestrator records a Research Lead dispatch. When this reaches direction_fatigue_threshold, the loop must pivot or dispatch coaching before continuing.
